title: [FIRRTL] Move the getInnerRefTo to a Utility
body:
Add a new utility in FIRRTLUtils.h to get the `InnerRefAttr` and `inner_sym`
 to any operation or module port. Every `FIRRTL` pass currently implements
 this  in a copy pasted function, resulting in duplicated code for every pass.
Refactor the code for `getInnerRefTo`, and move it to a common utility,
 instead of implementing a version of the utility in each pass. 
 The utility needs a lambda to lazily get the `ModuleNamespace` if a new name
 is required.
